text: The annual TechSummit 2025 will be held at Bangalore International Exhibition Centre on March 15, 2025. Registration costs Rs.2500 per attendee. The event falls under the Technology category.
GreenLeaf Organic Store is opening a new branch at MG Road, Pune on January 8, 2025. The grand opening celebration is free for all visitors. This is a Retail event.
The SmartWatch Pro X2 will be launched at the Consumer Electronics Expo in New Delhi Convention Center on April 20, 2025. Early bird pricing starts at Rs.15999. Filed under Electronics.

Chef's Table Fine Dining Restaurant introduces its Winter Special Menu at Connaught Place, New Delhi starting December 1, 2024. The tasting menu is priced at Rs.3500 per person. Category: Food and Dining.
The National Coding Championship 2025 will take place at IIT Bombay Campus on February 22, 2025. Participation fee is Rs.500. Category: Education.
CloudNine Airlines announces new direct flights from Hyderabad to Singapore starting June 1, 2025. Introductory fares begin at Rs.12999 one way. This falls under the Travel category.
The Modern Art Exhibition featuring works by Ananya Sharma will be displayed at the National Gallery of Modern Art, Mumbai from March 5 to April 10, 2025. Entry ticket costs Rs.200. Category: Art.

expected.name: Modern Art Exhibition by Ananya Sharma
expected.location: National Gallery of Modern Art, Mumbai

text: FitLife Gym launches its premium membership plan at Indiranagar, Bangalore on January 15, 2025. Annual membership costs Rs.25000. Categorized under Health and Fitness.
BrightMinds Academy is offering a new Machine Learning Bootcamp at their Koramangala center starting February 10, 2025. The course fee is Rs.45000 for the 3-month program. Category: Education.
The Vintage Car Rally 2025 will be flagged off from Gateway of India, Mumbai on March 30, 2025. Registration fee for participants is Rs.5000. Category: Automobile.
EcoHome Solar Panels introduces its new residential package available across all major cities starting April 1, 2025. Installation cost starts at Rs.85000. Category: Home Improvement.
The International Film Festival of Kerala will screen 200 films at Tagore Theatre, Thiruvananthapuram from December 12 to 19, 2024. Delegate pass costs Rs.350. Category: Entertainment.
ByteForce Hackathon 2025 invites developers to compete at T-Hub, Hyderabad on May 15, 2025. Registration is free with prizes worth Rs.5 lakhs. Category: Technology.
Reliance Digital is hosting a Mega Electronics Sale at Phoenix Marketcity, Chennai from January 25 to February 2, 2025. Discounts up to 60% with deals starting at Rs.499. Category: Electronics.
The Himalayan Trek Expedition organized by WanderLust Adventures departs from Manali on June 20, 2025. The 7-day expedition costs Rs.18500 per person. Category: Travel.
Dr. Priya Mehta is conducting a workshop on Mental Health Awareness at AIIMS Auditorium, New Delhi on April 7, 2025. Attendance is free for healthcare professionals. Category: Health.
The Wedding Expo 2025 showcasing designers and planners will be held at JW Marriott, Jaipur on February 14, 2025. Entry pass is Rs.1000 per couple. Category: Lifestyle.
NexGen Robotics is unveiling its household assistant robot at Auto Expo, Greater Noida on January 18, 2025. Pre-order price is Rs.149999. Category: Technology.
The Bangalore Literature Festival returns to Jayamahal Palace on November 22, 2025. Day pass costs Rs.750. Category: Literature.
GreenEnergy Corp announces a new wind farm project in Kutch, Gujarat beginning construction on July 1, 2025. Investment opportunities start at Rs.100000. Category: Energy.
SpiceRoute Restaurant launches its South Indian Thali Festival at Brigade Road, Bangalore from March 1 to March 31, 2025. The special thali is priced at Rs.299. Category: Food.
The Annual Science Fair organized by ISRO will be held at Vikram Sarabhai Space Centre, Thiruvananthapuram on October 15, 2025. Free entry for students with valid ID. Category: Science.
TechCorp India is hiring for its new AI Research Lab at Whitefield, Bangalore opening September 1, 2025. Starting salary for researchers is Rs.2500000 per annum. Category: Career.
The Indian Classical Music Concert featuring Pandit Ravi Shankar Tribute will be performed at Shanmukhananda Hall, Mumbai on August 15, 2025. Tickets start at Rs.500. Category: Music.

expected.name: Indian Classical Music Concert - Pandit Ravi Shankar Tribute

text: QuickServe Courier Services introduces same-day delivery in Pune starting February 1, 2025. Service charge is Rs.99 per package within city limits. Category: Logistics.
The Photography Workshop by National Geographic will be conducted at India Habitat Centre, New Delhi on April 25, 2025. Registration fee is Rs.3000. Category: Art.
PageTurner Bookstore is hosting a Children's Book Fair at Crossword, Linking Road, Mumbai from December 20 to 27, 2024. Entry is free with books starting at Rs.50. Category: Literature.
The Goa Carnival 2025 kicks off at Panaji on February 28, 2025. Street performances and parades are free to attend. Category: Festival.
DataBridge Analytics is launching a free webinar on Data Science Careers at their virtual platform on March 12, 2025. Open to all graduates. Category: Education.
The Premium Property Expo showcasing luxury apartments will be held at Leela Palace, Bangalore on May 3, 2025. Entry by invitation only valued at Rs.2000. Category: Real Estate.
AquaWorld Water Park opens its newest attraction, the Tsunami Wave Pool, at Electronic City, Bangalore on April 15, 2025. Entry ticket is Rs.1200 on weekdays. Category: Entertainment.
The Startup India Summit 2025 connects entrepreneurs and investors at Pragati Maidan, New Delhi on June 10, 2025. Startup booth rental costs Rs.15000. Category: Business.
SilverScreen Cinema reopens its IMAX theater at Forum Mall, Koramangala on January 5, 2025. IMAX tickets are Rs.450 for standard screenings. Category: Entertainment.
The Organic Farmers Market operates every Sunday at Cubbon Park, Bangalore starting March 2025. Vendor stall fee is Rs.800 per Sunday. Category: Agriculture.
CodeCraft Academy introduces a Python for Kids course at HSR Layout, Bangalore from April 5, 2025. Monthly fee is Rs.4000 for weekend classes. Category: Education.
The India Design Week will showcase innovative architecture at NSCI Dome, Mumbai from May 20 to 25, 2025. Professional pass costs Rs.5000. Category: Design.
PetCare Plus opens a new veterinary clinic and pet spa at Whitefield, Bangalore on March 18, 2025. First consultation is free for new clients. Category: Pet Care.
Marathon Masters announces the Bangalore Night Marathon on August 10, 2025. Starting point is Kanteerava Stadium. Registration fee is Rs.1500 for the full marathon. Category: Sports.
Heritage Walks Bangalore conducts guided tours of Lalbagh Botanical Garden every Saturday morning starting February 2025. Walk fee is Rs.300 per person. Category: Tourism.
The National Debate Championship for college students will be held at St. Xavier's College, Mumbai on March 25, 2025. Registration fee per team is Rs.1000. Category: Education.
CloudKitchen Express launches its new Thai cuisine menu at Koramangala, Bangalore from February 20, 2025. Meal combos start at Rs.249. Category: Food.
The Electric Vehicle Expo 2025 will showcase the latest EVs at Auto Cluster, Pune on July 5, 2025. Visitor pass costs Rs.200. Category: Automobile.
MindSpace Coworking opens a new 500-seat facility at Outer Ring Road, Bangalore on April 10, 2025. Monthly hot desk subscription is Rs.6000. Category: Business.
The Indian Handicrafts Exhibition will display traditional crafts from 28 states at Red Fort, Delhi from August 1 to 15, 2025. Entry fee is Rs.50. Category: Culture.
TechReads Publishers releases 'AI for Everyone' by Dr. Sanjay Kumar at Landmark Store, Chennai on March 8, 2025. Book price is Rs.599. Category: Publication.

expected.name: AI for Everyone by Dr. Sanjay Kumar

text: YogaLife Studio introduces hot yoga classes at Indiranagar, Bangalore starting January 20, 2025. Monthly unlimited pass costs Rs.3500. Category: Wellness.
The Kochi-Muziris Biennale showcases contemporary art installations at Fort Kochi from December 12, 2024 to April 10, 2025. Entry is free on Mondays. Category: Art.
SpeedNet Broadband launches 1 Gbps fiber internet plans in Hyderabad starting March 1, 2025. Monthly plans start at Rs.999. Category: Telecom.
The National Chess Championship 2025 will be held at Taj Mahal Hotel, Mumbai from April 20 to 28, 2025. Registration fee is Rs.2000 for FIDE-rated players. Category: Sports.
GreenPath Landscaping offers garden design consultations throughout Bangalore starting February 2025. Consultation fee is Rs.1500 per visit. Category: Home and Garden.
